title: Calonema stellatum
taxonomy: Calonema stellatum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the subfamily Orchidoideae. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Calonema stellatum is closely related to other orchid species. Further classification includes its placement within the genus Calonema and the tribe Coelogyneae. The specific classification of Calonema stellatum is still subject to ongoing research and updates.
